aiSlopCleaner.evidence: Changed-files cleanup pass found and fixed setupUtilities --check-only side effect and dead import; reran verification after cleanup. Fallback-like findings were grounded explicit failure/manual-instruction paths, not masking fallback slop.

verification.evidence: Final rerun: npm test 30 pass, npm run lint pass, npm run build pass, setup/doctor/update smoke checks returned valid JSON.

codeReview.evidence: Initial review found four blockers; all were fixed and regression-tested. Re-review returned APPROVE and CLEAR.

codeReviewer.evidence: CodeReviewFixGate: Recommendation APPROVE; no CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW findings. Confirmed explicit paths are non-provisioned, checksum manifest verification fails closed, update --json errors are structured, and getBinaryPath skips non-executable candidates.

architect.evidence: ArchitectFixGate: Architectural Status CLEAR; confirmed explicit/env overrides are validation-only, provisioning remains managed-bin only, CLI JSON failures are scriptable, repaired managed binaries are not shadowed, and CLI/services remain Electron-free.

architectureInvariantGate.evidence: All invariants were checked by implementation, tests, smoke checks, grep import boundary check, and independent review.

invariants.invariant: CLI commands must not import Electron runtime modules or electron-updater.
invariants.implementationEvidence: src/cli/index.ts imports Electron-free services only; grep found no electron/electron-updater imports in src/main/services/*.ts or src/cli/*.ts.
invariants.testEvidence: npm test, npm run build, and CLI smoke checks passed.

invariants.invariant: Desktop auto-update remains handled by electron-updater.
invariants.implementationEvidence: src/main/index.ts still calls initializeAutoUpdater(); CLI update service is separate from src/main/updater.ts.
invariants.reviewEvidence: ArchitectReviewGate and ArchitectFixGate confirmed desktop update boundary.

invariants.invariant: Utility provisioning must not mutate system package managers or explicit override paths.
invariants.implementationEvidence: setupUtilities provisions only managedTargetPath when no explicit path exists; explicit/env paths are validated and never provisioned even with --force.
invariants.testEvidence: tests/cli.test.mjs covers force with explicit paths and confirms file contents are unchanged.
invariants.reviewEvidence: CodeReviewFixGate and ArchitectFixGate confirmed blocker fixed.

invariants.invariant: Machine-readable CLI JSON must go to stdout and remain valid on update failures.
invariants.implementationEvidence: runUpdate catches update service errors and writes structured JSON when --json is set.
invariants.testEvidence: CLI update smoke returned valid JSON; npm test covers update services.
invariants.reviewEvidence: CodeReviewFixGate confirmed structured JSON failure behavior.

invariants.invariant: Release downloads must verify checksum metadata when available.
invariants.implementationEvidence: downloadCliUpdate throws if checksum manifest fetch fails, selected asset is absent, or SHA256 mismatch occurs.
invariants.testEvidence: tests/cli.test.mjs covers omitted selected asset and SHA256 verification.
invariants.reviewEvidence: CodeReviewFixGate confirmed checksum path fails closed.

invariants.invariant: Unsupported update apply modes must not mutate files.
invariants.implementationEvidence: applyCliUpdate only validates readable asset path and returns applied:false with manual instructions.
invariants.reviewEvidence: ArchitectFixGate confirmed unsupported apply remains non-mutating.
